title: How a Godly Man Leads Without a Title
caption:
You don't need a title to lead.

Most men are waiting for the role before they do the work. Waiting to be made a manager before they start managing themselves. Waiting to be called a leader before they act like one.

But every man Christ ever used started where he was, with what he had, going first into the thing nobody wanted to walk into.

First to apologize. First to serve. First to have the hard conversation. First to protect what he was responsible for, whether anyone gave him credit or not.

"Whoever wants to be great among you must be your servant." — Matthew 20:26.

That's the whole model. You don't get the title and then become the man. You become the man and the rest follows — or it doesn't, and it turns out you were never doing it for the title anyway.

Save this and send it to the man waiting for permission to start.

#faith #christianmen #leadership #godlymen #manofgod #disciplineequalsfreedom #masculinity #christianity #thevision
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
